title: IPSECKEY
helpOutput:
Usage: ipseckey [<options>] <query>

  Look up DNS IPSECKEY records for a domain or IP.

Options:
  --json               Output results in JSON format
  -s, --server=<text>  DNS server to query (default: system resolver)
  -t, --timeout=<int>  Query timeout in seconds
  -h, --help           Show this message and exit

Arguments:
  <query>  Domain name or reverse IP to look up IPSECKEY records for
output: No IPSECKEY records found for example.com
